title: boronia juncea subsp. micrantha
intro: Boronia juncea subsp. micrantha, also known as the small-flowered boronia, is a subspecies of the Boronia juncea plant, native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Boronia juncea subsp. micrantha include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Boronia juncea subsp. micrantha include essential oils and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
